---
layout: post
title: "William Fletcher Batie"
date: 2022-08-10 12:57:00 +0000
published: false
---

<p>&nbsp;William Fletcher Batie</p>

<p>
</p>

<p>William was born in 1861 in Grant County, Wisconsin to Thomas and Letitia Batie.&nbsp; The family moved to Coon Valley, Iowa by the time William was 18.&nbsp; In the 1880 Census, William is listed as a Teacher.&nbsp; His mom is listed as Keeps house/Teacher.&nbsp; I'm unclear what it means in this case to have both words on the Occupation field.&nbsp; Both?&nbsp; Typo?&nbsp; I'm still looking.</p>

<p>
</p>

<p>On June 26,1888, William married Mahala Jane Rench in Grant City, Iowa.&nbsp; On his marriage record, William is listed as a farmer.</p>

<p>From this marriage, 8 children were born.</p>

<p><img alt="" src="data:image/png;base64," /> 
</p>

<p>William is top left.&nbsp; His father, Thomas, is top right.&nbsp; Below William is his brother&nbsp; 
</p>

<p>Back row: William F Batie &amp; his father, Thomas Batie.

Seated: son William Batie holding his son &amp; daughter Martha Batie 
Howthorne holder her son. Taken in Sac County, Iowa about 1920. 
</p>

<p>William continued to live in Coon Valley until his death.</p>

<p>On November 3rd, 1928, William passed away. &nbsp; 
</p>

<p>
</p>

<p>
</p>

<p>
</p>

<p>
</p>
